kirundi.no_timers_no_races_no_streak_punishmen: Nta timer, nta marushanwa, nta bihano vya streak. Genda ku muvuduko wawe. Hagarara igihe cose.
kirundi.drill_ai_writes_practice_text_at_your_: — AI yandika inyandiko y'imyimenyerezo ku rwego rw'ishure ryawe ku kintu cose ukunda. Ugurura
kirundi.can_change_the_row_of_colored_swatches: birashobora guhinduka — umurongo w'amabara hejuru uhindura hagati ya theme 5. Canke ufyonde
kirundi.a_clinician_or_teacher_can_set_an_iep_: Umuganga canke umwigisha ashobora gushiraho intego ya IEP no gusohora iterambere kuva kuri
kirundi.unique_calendar_days_with_at_least_one: Iminsi itandukanye ya kalendari ifite nibura session imwe mu minsi 30 ishize. Nta caha ku minsi yo kuruhuka.
kirundi.or_press_space_or_enter_to_begin_press: Canke ufyonde Space canke Enter kugira ngo utangure. Fyonda Esc igihe cose muri drill kugira ngo usohoke.
kirundi.non_english_passages_use_ascii_only_no: Inyandiko zitari iz'Icongereza zikoresha ASCII gusa (nta accent / tilde) kugira ngo utubuto twa keyboard tusanzwe tugume ari yo ntego y'imyimenyerezo.
kirundi.no_text_loaded_for_this_drill: Nta nyandiko yashizwemo kuri iyi drill.
kirundi.each_bar_chars_typed_in_a_10_second_wi: Buri kadomo = inyuguti zanditswe mu idirisha rya segonde 10. Shira imbeba hejuru kugira ngo urabe WPM iyi n'iyi.
kirundi.your_answer_helps_teachers_see_when_th: Igisubizo cawe gifasha abigisha kubona igihe imibare itavuga inkuru yose.
kirundi.refine_the_last_image_using_image_to_i: Noza ifoto ya nyuma ukoresheje image-to-image aho gutangura bushasha
kirundi.download_this_image_as_a_png_file: Kuramwo iyi foto nka dosiye ya PNG
kirundi.shows_the_full_passage_for_this_many_s: Yerekana inyandiko yose muri izi segonde mbere y'uko kwandika bitangira. Ifasha abanyeshure bungukirwa no gusoma mbere, hanyuma bakandika. Umunyeshure ashobora gusimbuka kubara igihe cose.
kirundi.after_this_many_minutes_of_active_typi: Nyuma y'iyi minota yo kwandika nyako (igihe co guhagarara ntikibarwa), erekana kwibutsa gutuje ko waruhuka. Bibaho rimwe kuri buri drill. Vyazimijwe mu buryo busanzwe.
kirundi.swap_the_highlight_color_used_for_the_: Hindura ibara ry'ibanze rikoreshwa ku nyuguti iriho, utubuto, n'ibimenyetso vy'ingenzi. Ku banyeshure babona ubururu bukonje cane canke bashaka amabara ashushe kugira ngo bibande. High-contrast mode isumba ibi.
kirundi.prefer_shorter_or_longer_drill_texts_s: Toranya inyandiko za drill ngufi canke ndende. "Ngufi" ifasha abanyeshure bafite ikibazo co kwibanda canke umunaniro; "Ndende" ni ku banyeshure bubaka kwihangana. Nimba drill idafite sample ihuye n'ico wahisemo, isubira kuri iyo ari yo yose.
kirundi.a_soft_pulsing_dot_on_the_drill_screen: Akadomo gatuje gatera ku kimenyetso ca drill kerekana injana ihamye. NTA gihano ku kugenda buhoro — iki ni icitegererezo, si igihe ntarengwa. Gifasha gutegura imikorere y'umubiri. Vyazimijwe mu buryo busanzwe.
kirundi.e_g_typing_feels_hard_now_but_i_m_goin: urugero, "Kwandika biragoye ubu, ariko nzashobora kwandika inkuru zanje bwite." · "Nshaka kohereza nyogokuru email nta mama umfasha." · "Kwandika vuba = igihe gito c'umukoro wo mu rugo."
kirundi.today_s_goal_is_yours_not_counted_agai: Intego y'uyu munsi ni iyawe — ntibarwa kuri wowe nimba utayigezeho. Isubira bushasha mu buryo bwikora ejo.
kirundi.set_an_iep_style_goal_here_it_shows_up: Shiraho intego y'ubwoko bwa IEP hano. Igaragara ku kimenyetso ca drill kandi yuzuza raporo y'iterambere mbere. Ikenewe gusa nimba ukora inyandiko zemewe z'iterambere.
kirundi.save_the_accommodations_iep_goal_audio: Bika accommodations + intego ya IEP + theme y'ijwi kuri JSON, canke ushiremo profile ivuye ku bundi buryo. NTIBIKOPA amateka ya session — ayo agumana buri munyeshure.
kirundi.full_backup_includes_sessions_personal: Backup yuzuye irimwo session, amanota meza cane, ubuhanga, ikarita y'amakosa, na library zombi — inyandiko yose y'umunyeshure. Koresha iyi mbere yo gusiba amakuru ya browser canke guhindura ibikoresho.
kirundi.affects_trend_report_csv_skill_tree_st: Bigira ingaruka ku ihinduka, raporo, CSV. Igiti c'ubumenyi kiguma c'igihe cose.
kirundi.green_improvement_red_regression_gray_: Δ y'icatsi = kwiyongera · umutuku = gusubira inyuma · imvi = nta gucira urubanza (igihe, umubare wa accommodations).
kirundi.top_error_keys_by_drill_all_time: Utubuto tw'amakosa menshi kuri buri drill · igihe cose
kirundi.different_drills_surface_different_wea: Drill zitandukanye zigaragaza intege nke zitandukanye. Koresha ibi mu gutoranya drill zibanda ku tubuto tw'ibibazo vyihariye.
kirundi.average_wpm_with_each_accommodation_on: Impuzandengo ya WPM buri accommodation ifunguye vs ifunze. Igiteranyo mu bwoko bwose bwa drill — ivangwa rya drill rishobora kuyovya, bityo koresha igabanywa rya buri drill muri raporo hepfo ku vyemezo vy'ingenzi.
kirundi.tap_the_report_to_select_all_or_use_th: Fyonda raporo kugira ngo utoranye vyose, canke ukoreshe utubuto hepfo.
kirundi.copy_a_2_4_sentence_plain_language_sum: Andukura incamake y'interuro 2-4 mu rurimi rworoshe ku email y'umuvyeyi
kirundi.repeat_your_last_drill_fast_jump: Subiramwo drill yawe ya nyuma (gusimbuka vuba)
kirundi.everything_in_typing_practice_can_be_r: Ibintu vyose muri Imyimenyerezo yo Kwandika bishobora kugerwako na keyboard — vyagenewe abakoresha screen-reader na accommodations zo gutegura imikorere y'umubiri.
kirundi.accommodation_toggles_on_the_drill_int: Ibihinduka vya accommodations ku kimenyetso c'intanguriro ya drill bishobora kugerwako vyuzuye na keyboard binyuze kuri Tab — nta mouse ikenewe ku gice ico ari co cose c'iki gikoresho.
kirundi.optional_game_mode_words_rise_from_the: Ubwoko bw'umukino bwo gutoranya. Amagambo azamuka avuye hasi; andika ijambo ryo hejuru kugira ngo urisibe. Iyo umurundo ugeze ku gisenge umukino urarangira. Nta leaderboard, nta caha ca streak — ni amanota meza cane gusa.
kirundi.each_theme_has_a_mascot_who_shows_up_i: Buri theme ifite mascot igaragara ku kibuga c'umukino, kuri menu, no ku kimenyetso c'incamake. Basubiza ivyo ukora — combo, akaga, igitero, ibitotsi, gutsinda, gutsindwa.
kirundi.choose_an_attack_word_to_send_to_the_b: Toranya ijambo ry'igitero ryo kohereza kuri bot
kirundi.attack_ready_pick_a_word_to_send: ⚡ IGITERO CITEGUYE — toranya ijambo ryo kohereza
kirundi.tap_a_card_or_press_1_2_3_to_send_pres: Fyonda ikarita CANKE ufyonde 1 / 2 / 3 kugira ngo wohereze. Fyonda Esc kugira ngo usimbuke kandi utohereze. Umurundo wawe warakonje mu gihe utoranya.
kirundi.paused_both_stacks_frozen_press_resume: ⏸ Vyahagaritswe — imirundo yombi yarakonje. Fyonda Bandanya canke Esc kugira ngo ubandanye.
kirundi.steady_progression_maintain_accuracy_f: Iterambere rihamye. Bandanya urwego rwo hasi rw'ukuri.
kirundi.speed_accuracy_in_productive_band_sust: Umuvuduko + ukuri mu rwego rutanga umusaruro. Imyimenyerezo iramvye.
kirundi.five_sliders_tune_your_practice_target: Slider eshanu zihindura intego y'imyimenyerezo yawe. Widget ishira agace kawe muri kimwe mu bihe 5 bitandukanye kandi ishushanya Pareto frontier ya WPM-ukuri. Nta manota ku bihinduka vyawe — ubushakashatsi buri mu gushaka ahantu h'imyimenyerezo iramvye.
kirundi.pareto_curve_best_accuracy_achievable_: Pareto curve = ukuri kwiza cane gushobora kugerwako kuri buri WPM. Hejuru = ntibishoboka; hepfo = hari umwanya wo gukura.
kirundi.hypothesis_free_text_what_is_your_sust: Iciyumviro (inyandiko yisanzuye): Intego yawe iramvye ni iyihe? Urwego rwo hasi rw'ukuri ruhindura rute WPM nyayo?
kirundi.set_wpm_80_accuracy_98_realistic_compa: Shira WPM=80, ukuri=98. Birashoboka? Gereranya n'ikimenyetso c'agace kawe.
kirundi.i_understand_the_tradeoff_explain_in_o: Numva imiterere — sigura mu magambo yawe
kirundi.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_wpm_a: Sigura mu magambo yawe: WPM, ukuri, n'imbaraga z'imikorere bikorana bite? Pareto frontier isigura iki ku myitozo yo kwandika?
kirundi.design_note_discrete_5_zone_marker_par: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso c'utuce 5 dutandukanye; Pareto curve yerekana umwanya w'imiterere; nta ntego "nyayo" — vyagenewe gutyo.
